case_title: VERONICA KIRKLAND VS. MUSIC CITY HOSTEL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-17-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VERONICA KIRKLAND IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM AUDIO APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT MUSCI CITY HOSTEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRIAN DAVY, GENERAL MANAGER AND EIDY POOT-TEM HOUSEKEEPING SUPERVISOR. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT QUESTIONED AS TO SERVICE, AND PROCEDURE SEEMED PROPER. DUE TO UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST TO THE COURT (SUBMISSION MUST BE RECEIVED AT THE COURTHOUSE TEN DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE). CONTINUANCE WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE FILING ISSUES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS SUBMITTED WITH ZOOM REQUEST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KIRKLAND, VERONICA AS TO DEFENDANT MUSIC CITY HOSTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRKLAND, VERONICA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRKLAND, VERONICA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT MUSIC CITY HOSTEL
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRKLAND, VERONICA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-17-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF VERONICA KIRKLAND IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT MUSIC CITY HOSTEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRIAN DAVEY (GENERAL MANAGER) AND EIDY POOT-TEM (HOUSEKEEPING SUPERVISOR). BOTH PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATED TO HAVE THEIR MATTER HEARD BY THE PRO TEM JUDGE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF KIRKLAND, VERONICA
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(PLANTIFF)**GRANTED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KIRKLAND, VERONICA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUSIC CITY HOSTEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
